The goal is to work on an incredible Master's thesis for Praveen on the topic "Monocular Vision and Machine Learning for Depth Estimation for Autonomous vehicles". The goal it to have have the objects on the road be detected and then we should have the depth information of the object in the bounding box.

Feel free to advice me if I'm going in the wrong direction or if I should do something differently, early, so I do not waste too much time on it.

For the ML models, I have an Asus A15 laptop with Nvidia RTX 4050 laptop,  16gb RAM and AMD Ryzen 7 7735HS and 64bit OS. I can train the models on my university's HPC. But if the inferencing can be done later on, on an NVIDIA Jetson Orin, that will be great.
